case.title: HOLMES v. SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA

opinion.h4: HOLMES v. SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, (1967)
">HOLMES v. SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 1063, Misc. Decided February 13, 1967.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
